message:
fix(search): use total_cmp and tie-break by index for deterministic sort order

Fix ScoredEntry ordering to be fully deterministic and correct:

- Replace PartialEq based on raw f64 equality with total_cmp comparison
  plus index tie-breaking, ensuring NaN values don't cause inconsistent
  equality (f64::NAN != f64::NAN but total_cmp treats them consistently)
- Replace Ord implementation using partial_cmp().unwrap_or(Equal) with
  total_cmp().then_with(idx comparison), eliminating the NaN edge case
  where partial_cmp returns None and unwrap_or silently treats all NaN
  scores as equal regardless of their actual sort position
- The idx tie-break ensures stable sort order when multiple entries
  share the same score, preventing non-deterministic result ordering

Also sync beads issue tracker and last-touched timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
